label: Lantern Quiet Berth
description: Lantern Quiet Berth is a narrow sleeping chamber set within The Pallid Lantern’s ferrocrete ribbing, its corners squared by blast-braced pilasters and a low, vault-curved ceiling. A recessed cot niche and bolted locker occupy opposing walls, their plasteel faces scuffed by long use under enclave ration discipline. Hooded lumen strips cast a regulated pallor that leaves the room’s edges in controlled shadow, while exposed vent grilles carry the tavern’s constant, filtered airflow. Sound-damping panels and a sealable inner hatch preserve the enclave’s blackout protocol and keep the space austerely self-contained.
